title: TODO: short title
description: A blue/green deployment is pending. The green slot is warmed up but not yet promoted. live_slot points to blue, green.health reads warming, and deploy.state is switch_pending. The task is to complete the cutover: mark green as healthy, switch live traffic to green, and update the deploy state.
hint_1: check green.health to see why traffic hasn't moved
hint_2: validate green, then set it to healthy
hint_3: switch live_slot from blue to green
hint_4: echo healthy > green.health && echo green > live_slot && echo switched > deploy.state
